SEARCH

Serialized Form

  • Package client.net

    • Exception Class client.net.ClientConnection.ConnectionClosedException

      class ConnectionClosedException extends IOException implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

  • Package common.dto

    • Class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO

      class CancellationsReportDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • avgPerDay
          double avgPerDay
          Average cancellations+no-shows per calendar day of the inclusive range.
        • fromDate
          String fromDate
          Echo of the inclusive range start, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
        • parkId
          Integer parkId
          Echo of the park filter, or null for the whole region (all parks).
        • rows
          List<CancellationsReportRow> rows
          One row per active day, oldest first (quiet days omitted).
        • toDate
          String toDate
          Echo of the inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
        • totalCancelled
          int totalCancelled
          Total reservations cancelled across the whole range.
        • totalNoShow
          int totalNoShow
          Total reservations marked no-show across the whole range.

    • Class common.dto.CancellationsReportRow

      class CancellationsReportRow extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • cancelled
          int cancelled
          Reservations cancelled (ReservationStatus.CANCELLED) that day.
        • date
          String date
          The calendar day the status changed, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
        • noShow
          int noShow
          Reservations marked no-show (ReservationStatus.NO_SHOW) that day.

    • Class common.dto.ClientRequest

      class ClientRequest extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • correlationId
          long correlationId
          Stores the correlation id value used by this component.
        • data
          Map<String,Object> data
          Stores the data value used by this component.
        • type
          RequestType type
          Stores the type value used by this component.

    • Class common.dto.NotificationDTO

      class NotificationDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • acknowledgedAt
          String acknowledgedAt
          Acknowledgement timestamp (string form), or null while unread.
        • body
          String body
          Human-readable message body.
        • channel
          String channel
          Delivery channel: "SIM_EMAIL", "SIM_SMS", or "POPUP".
        • createdAt
          String createdAt
          Creation timestamp (string form).
        • id
          int id
          Unique notification identifier (primary key).
        • recipientUserId
          Integer recipientUserId
          Recipient staff user's id, or null when addressed to a visitor.
        • recipientVisitorId
          Long recipientVisitorId
          Recipient visitor's national id, or null when addressed to a staff user.
        • sentAt
          String sentAt
          Delivery timestamp (string form), or null if not yet delivered.
        • simulatedTarget
          String simulatedTarget
          Recipient contact the message would be sent to (email/phone, or a staff username).

    • Class common.dto.OccupancyDTO

      class OccupancyDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • available
          int available
          Remaining headroom: maxCapacity - gapSize - current (may be negative).
        • current
          int current
          People currently inside the park (sum of open-visit headcounts).
        • gapSize
          int gapSize
          The reserved capacity buffer held back from maxCapacity.
        • maxCapacity
          int maxCapacity
          The park's maximum physical capacity.
        • parkId
          int parkId
          Identifier of the park this snapshot describes.

    • Class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO

      class ParameterChangeRequestDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • createdAt
          String createdAt
          When the request was created (string form), or null.
        • decidedAt
          String decidedAt
          When the request was decided (string form), or null while PENDING.
        • decidedBy
          Integer decidedBy
          Department manager who decided it (user.id), or null while PENDING.
        • field
          ParamField field
          Which park parameter the change targets.
        • id
          int id
          Unique request identifier (primary key).
        • newValue
          int newValue
          The requested new value.
        • oldValue
          int oldValue
          The park's value for that field when the request was made.
        • parkId
          int parkId
          Identifier of the park the change targets.
        • parkName
          String parkName
          Display name of the target park, joined in for convenience.
        • requestedBy
          int requestedBy
          Identifier of the park manager who requested the change (user.id).
        • requesterName
          String requesterName
          Full name of the requesting park manager, joined in from user for display.
        • status
          ChangeStatus status
          Current lifecycle status of the request.

    • Class common.dto.ParkDTO

      class ParkDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • defaultStayMinutes
          int defaultStayMinutes
          Default visit length, in minutes.
        • gapSize
          int gapSize
          Reserved capacity buffer subtracted from maxCapacity when booking.
        • id
          int id
          Unique park identifier (primary key).
        • managerId
          Integer managerId
          Identifier of the park's manager (user.id), or null if none.
        • maxCapacity
          int maxCapacity
          Maximum visitor capacity.
        • name
          String name
          Display name of the park.
        • specialDiscountPercent
          int specialDiscountPercent
          Additional special-sale discount percent for this park.

    • Class common.dto.ReservationDTO

      class ReservationDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • confirmationCode
          Integer confirmationCode
          Booking confirmation code, or null if not yet issued.
        • createdAt
          String createdAt
          Timestamp the reservation row was created (DB DATETIME as string).
        • guideId
          Long guideId
          Identifier of the assigned guide, or null if none.
        • id
          int id
          Unique reservation identifier (primary key).
        • isGroup
          boolean isGroup
          Whether this booking is treated as an organised group.
        • paidInAdvance
          boolean paidInAdvance
          Whether the reservation was paid for in advance.
        • parkId
          int parkId
          Identifier of the park this reservation is booked against.
        • partySize
          int partySize
          Number of people in the party.
        • priceCents
          int priceCents
          Price of the reservation, in cents.
        • status
          ReservationStatus status
          Current lifecycle state of the reservation.
        • visitDate
          String visitDate
          Scheduled visit date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
        • visitorId
          long visitorId
          National-ID-style identifier of the owning visitor.
        • visitTime
          String visitTime
          Scheduled visit time (HH:mm:ss), or null if unset.
        • visitType
          VisitType visitType
          Nature of the visit (individual/family/group).

    • Class common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO

      class ReservationUpdateResultDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • newPriceCents
          int newPriceCents
          The reservation's recomputed price after the edit, in cents.
        • oldPriceCents
          int oldPriceCents
          The reservation's price before the edit, in cents.
        • reservation
          ReservationDTO reservation
          The reservation as persisted after the edit (carries the new price).

    • Class common.dto.ServerEvent

      class ServerEvent extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • entity
          String entity
          Stores the entity value used by this component.
        • entityId
          long entityId
          Stores the entity id value used by this component.
        • op
          EventOp op
          Stores the op value used by this component.
        • payload
          Serializable payload
          Stores the payload value used by this component.
        • timestamp
          long timestamp
          Stores the timestamp value used by this component.

    • Class common.dto.ServerResponse

      class ServerResponse extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • correlationId
          long correlationId
          Stores the correlation id value used by this component.
        • data
          Object data
          Stores the data value used by this component.
        • message
          String message
          Stores the message value used by this component.
        • success
          boolean success
          Stores the success value used by this component.

      class SubscriptionKey extends Record implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • entity
          String entity
          The field for the entity record component.
        • entityId
          long entityId
          The field for the entityId record component.

    • Class common.dto.UsageReportDTO

      class UsageReportDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • fromDate
          String fromDate
        • parkId
          Integer parkId
        • rows
          List<UsageReportRow> rows
        • toDate
          String toDate

    • Class common.dto.UsageReportRow

      class UsageReportRow extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • date
          String date
        • maxCapacity
          int maxCapacity
        • parkId
          int parkId
        • parkName
          String parkName
        • totalVisitors
          int totalVisitors
        • unusedCapacity
          int unusedCapacity

    • Class common.dto.UserDTO

      class UserDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • fullName
          String fullName
          Display name of the user.
        • id
          int id
          Unique user identifier (primary key).
        • parkId
          Integer parkId
          Identifier of the park the user belongs to, or null if none.
        • role
          Role role
          Staff role governing the user's permissions.
        • username
          String username
          Login username.

    • Class common.dto.VisitDTO

      class VisitDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • enteredAt
          String enteredAt
          Entry timestamp (DB DATETIME as string).
        • exitedAt
          String exitedAt
          Exit timestamp (DB DATETIME as string), or null while still inside.
        • headcount
          int headcount
          Number of people in the party counted against occupancy.
        • id
          int id
          Unique visit identifier (primary key).
        • parkId
          int parkId
          Identifier of the park entered.
        • priceCents
          Integer priceCents
          Price charged in cents (casual visits only), or null for a reservation visit.
        • reservationId
          Integer reservationId
          Identifier of the backing reservation, or null for a casual walk-in.
        • visitorId
          Long visitorId
          National-ID-style identifier of the visitor, or null if anonymous.
        • visitType
          VisitType visitType
          Nature of the visit (casual visits only), or null for a reservation visit.

    • Class common.dto.VisitorDTO

      class VisitorDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • email
          String email
          Contact email on file, or null if none recorded.
        • fullName
          String fullName
          Display name of the visitor.
        • id
          long id
          National-ID-style visitor identifier (primary key).
        • isSubscriber
          boolean isSubscriber
          Whether this visitor holds a subscription.
        • phone
          String phone
          Contact phone number on file, or null if none recorded.

    • Class common.dto.VisitsReportDTO

      class VisitsReportDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • fromDate
          String fromDate
          Echo of the inclusive range start, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
        • parkId
          Integer parkId
          Echo of the park filter, or null for the whole region (all parks).
        • rows
          List<VisitsReportRow> rows
          One row per visitor category (always both "INDIVIDUALS" and "GROUPS").
        • toDate
          String toDate
          Echo of the inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.

    • Class common.dto.VisitsReportRow

      class VisitsReportRow extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • avgStayMinutes
          double avgStayMinutes
          Average stay in minutes over the closed visits (0 if none closed).
        • category
          String category
          Visitor category: "INDIVIDUALS" or "GROUPS".
        • visitCount
          int visitCount
          Number of visits in this category (open and closed).

    • Class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO

      class WaitlistEntryDTO extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • grabExpiresAt
          String grabExpiresAt
          When the active grab offer lapses, or null if none is active.
        • grabOfferedAt
          String grabOfferedAt
          When a freed slot was offered to this entry, or null if none is active.
        • id
          int id
          Unique waiting-list entry identifier (primary key).
        • parkId
          int parkId
          Park the queued reservation is for (joined from the reservation).
        • partySize
          int partySize
          Party size of the queued reservation (joined).
        • queuedAt
          String queuedAt
          When the visitor joined the queue (DB DATETIME as string).
        • reservationId
          int reservationId
          Identifier of the WAITING reservation this entry queues.
        • visitDate
          String visitDate
          Visit date the queued reservation is for, ISO yyyy-MM-dd (joined).
        • visitorId
          long visitorId
          National-ID-style identifier of the owning visitor (joined).
